title: Small Knight
description: Replaces the standard Totem of Immortality with a cute Knight from "Hollow Knight", who is always ready to help you out in trouble!
body:
**![The picture shows a knight from the game "Hollow Knight." He is sitting in a cave with a blue light shining into it. Next to him is his flashlight, which also shines blue. Opposite the knight is the text stating the name of the "Small Knight" texture pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14539d80cf763852bafb961c3f686aab82477b1d.jpeg)**
**Small Knight**

This texture pack replaces the standard Totem of Immortality with the iconic protagonist from **Hollow Knight**. Instead of a generic golden figure, you will now carry a tiny, brave Knight or his mysterious Shadow, ready to pull you back from the brink of defeat!

- **Two Iconic Skins:** Choose between the classic Little Knight or the Hollow Knight's Shadow.
 
- **Perfect Companion:** The model looks great in your left hand, providing "moral support" during intense PvP battles or everyday survival.
  
-  A must-have for fans of Team Cherry's masterpiece who want to bring a piece of Hallownest into Minecraft.

**Knight Variations**

We've added a couple of variations of the knight. According to the game's canon, we have a regular knight and his shadow, which appears after death. We've added that as well.
To obtain the shadow, you need to rename the totem to **"Shadows"**

![Two knights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d990c145333e7c9b4809dbe81c5df09d7217885_0.webp)

**Future**

In the future, we're looking to add more knight variants, and possibly other characters as well. Stay tuned, we have lots of ideas ^.^
